--- !bad_match_bare_shortest.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH SHORTEST (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person)
RETURN a, b

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/gql/!bad_match_bare_shortest.sql:2:16: bare SHORTEST path search prefix is not supported; use ANY SHORTEST or SHORTEST <count>
  2|  MATCH SHORTEST (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person)
   |                 ^


--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.BadGQLLinearQueryStatement{
        BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
          NodePos: 15,
          NodeEnd: 73,
          Tokens:  []*token.Token{
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    "\n",
              Raw:      "MATCH",
              AsString: "MATCH",
              Pos:      15,
              End:      20,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    " ",
              Raw:      "SHORTEST",
              AsString: "SHORTEST",
              Pos:      21,
              End:      29,

            &token.Token{
              Kind:  "(",
              Space: " ",
              Raw:   "(",
              Pos:   30,
              End:   31,

              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Raw:      "a",
              AsString: "a",

              End:  33,

              Pos:      69,
              End:      70,

            &token.Token{

              Raw:  ",",
              Pos:  70,
              End:  71,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    " ",
              Raw:      "b",
              AsString: "b",
              Pos:      72,
              End:      73,
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH SHORTEST (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person) RETURN a, b
